file.content:
{
  "name": "personalwebsite",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "packageManager": "npm@10.9.2",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "postbuild": "next-sitemap --config next-sitemap.config.js && npm run build:resume-pdf",
    "build:resume-pdf": "tsx scripts/resume/build-pdf.ts",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint": "next lint",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:e2e": "playwright test",
    "lighthouse:ci": "lhci autorun --config=./.lighthouserc.json",
    "ship-gate:projects": "tsx scripts/ship-gates/projects.ts",
    "ingest": "tsx scripts/llm/ingest.ts",
    "ingest:rebuild": "tsx scripts/llm/ingest.ts --rebuild",
    "evals:llm": "tsx evals/llm/run.ts",
    "db:generate": "drizzle-kit generate",
    "db:migrate": "tsx scripts/llm/migrate.ts"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@anthropic-ai/sdk": "^0.91.1",
    "@mdx-js/loader": "^3.1.1",
    "@mdx-js/react": "^3.1.1",
    "@next/mdx": "^16.2.4",
    "@radix-ui/react-dialog": "^1.1.15",
    "@radix-ui/react-visually-hidden": "^1.2.4",
    "@types/mdx": "^2.0.13",
    "@upstash/redis": "^1.37.0",
    "@vercel/analytics": "^2.0.1",
    "drizzle-orm": "^0.45.2",
    "framer-motion": "^12.38.0",
    "fuse.js": "^7.3.0",
    "next": "^15.1.0",
    "next-sitemap": "^4.2.3",
    "pgvector": "^0.2.1",
    "postgres": "^3.4.9",
    "react": "^19.0.0",
    "react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "zod": "^4.3.6",
    "zustand": "^5.0.12"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@anthropic-ai/tokenizer": "^0.0.4",
    "@axe-core/playwright": "^4.11.2",
    "@axe-core/react": "^4.11.2",
    "@lhci/cli": "^0.14.0",
    "@next/bundle-analyzer": "^16.2.4",
    "@playwright/test": "^1.59.1",
    "@testing-library/react": "^16.3.2",
    "@types/node": "^22.0.0",
    "@types/react": "^19.0.0",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "axe-core": "^4.11.3",
    "drizzle-kit": "^0.31.10",
    "eslint": "^9.0.0",
    "eslint-config-next": "^15.1.0",
    "jsdom": "^29.0.2",
    "prettier": "^3.8.3",
    "stylelint": "^17.8.0",
    "stylelint-config-standard": "^40.0.0",
    "tsx": "^4.21.0",
    "typescript": "^5.0.0",
    "vitest": "^4.1.4"
  }
}

content.content:
1	# Public site URL used by next-sitemap and OG image absolute paths.
2	SITE_URL=https://personalwebsite-beta-nine.vercel.app
3	
4	# Future: contact form backend, transactional email
5	# RESEND_API_KEY=
6	# GITHUB_TOKEN=
7	
8	# LLM-of-me corpus store (suite 18 / P05).
9	# POSTGRES_URL is the pooled runtime connection used by the app.
10	# POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING is the direct connection used for migrations.
11	# Vercel Postgres exposes both env vars automatically; for other providers
12	# the same string can be used for both. The first migration creates the
13	# pgvector extension (CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;) — Vercel
14	# Postgres has pgvector available out of the box; on other providers the
15	# extension must be installed at the cluster level first.
16	# POSTGRES_URL=
17	# POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING=
18

file.content:
# Public site URL used by next-sitemap and OG image absolute paths.
SITE_URL=https://personalwebsite-beta-nine.vercel.app

# Future: contact form backend, transactional email
# RESEND_API_KEY=
# GITHUB_TOKEN=

# LLM-of-me corpus store (suite 18 / P05).
# POSTGRES_URL is the pooled runtime connection used by the app.
# POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING is the direct connection used for migrations.
# Vercel Postgres exposes both env vars automatically; for other providers
# the same string can be used for both. The first migration creates the
# pgvector extension (CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS vector;) — Vercel
# Postgres has pgvector available out of the box; on other providers the
# extension must be installed at the cluster level first.
# POSTGRES_URL=
# POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING=

content.text:
All checks pass. Sitemap contains the three `/projects/<slug>` URLs at priority 0.8, `/chat` at weekly/0.6, home at 1.0, about/resume at 0.7. `robots.txt` carries the wildcard + GPTBot/ClaudeBot/CCBot policies and the sitemap reference. `postbuild` already runs `next-sitemap`.

**AI-crawler decision flagged for review:** the defaults committed are `GPTBot: Allow`, `ClaudeBot: Allow`, `CCBot: Disallow`. Reasonable but opinionated — revisit if you'd rather block all training crawlers, or allow CCBot, or extend the list (Google-Extended, Bytespider, anthropic-ai, PerplexityBot, etc.).

Note: `next-sitemap` regenerates `public/robots.txt` on each build from `robotsTxtOptions`, so the static file gets overwritten — but its policies remain identical because they're encoded in the config. The regenerated file also includes a `Host:` directive (Yandex-specific) that isn't harmful.

IMPL_RESULT: PASS

result:
All checks pass. Sitemap contains the three `/projects/<slug>` URLs at priority 0.8, `/chat` at weekly/0.6, home at 1.0, about/resume at 0.7. `robots.txt` carries the wildcard + GPTBot/ClaudeBot/CCBot policies and the sitemap reference. `postbuild` already runs `next-sitemap`.

**AI-crawler decision flagged for review:** the defaults committed are `GPTBot: Allow`, `ClaudeBot: Allow`, `CCBot: Disallow`. Reasonable but opinionated — revisit if you'd rather block all training crawlers, or allow CCBot, or extend the list (Google-Extended, Bytespider, anthropic-ai, PerplexityBot, etc.).

Note: `next-sitemap` regenerates `public/robots.txt` on each build from `robotsTxtOptions`, so the static file gets overwritten — but its policies remain identical because they're encoded in the config. The regenerated file also includes a `Host:` directive (Yandex-specific) that isn't harmful.

IMPL_RESULT: PASS
